label: 671 to 676 Omitted
notes: Chapter consisted of , , , in its entirety. Under the terms of section 6(b) thereof, as amended, the provisions of terminated on . Section 671, , , , authorized Commissioner of Education to conduct a program of grants-in-aid to help provide courses of training and study for teachers of the deaf and to improve existing courses.Pub. L. 87–276, § 175 Stat. 575Sept. 22, 1961
Section 672, , , , provided for making of payments by Commissioner under such a program.Pub. L. 87–276, § 275 Stat. 575Sept. 22, 1961
Section 674, , , , authorized Commissioner to delegate his functions under this chapter except the making of regulations.Pub. L. 87–276, § 475 Stat. 576Sept. 22, 1961

Section 675, , , , established Advisory Committee on the Training of Teachers of the Deaf to review and otherwise make recommendations in connection with grants-in-aid program.Pub. L. 87–276, § 575 Stat. 576Sept. 22, 1961

Section 676, , , ; , , , authorized appropriations up through fiscal year ending , and provided for termination of this chapter on . , , , repealed title III of , cited above.Pub.
